prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约8218名、9103名、11724名、6098名、4748名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势，2023年触底后连续两年大幅前移，2025年基准约 4748名，为近五年最佳水平；2021–2023年本省物理类计划均为76人，2024年降至66人，2025年略回升至67人；2026年计划进一步缩减至60人，较2025年 减少约10.4%，缩招幅度明显，名额减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第35名、2022年第37名、2023年 第37名、2024年第36名、2025年第36名、2026年第37名，排名稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖211行列；2025年声誉偏正面，投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工 程师学院、保研率升至27%；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室爆炸火灾事故）；抖音综合热度排名第61位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；2025年投档异常信号为"高关注"，反映 南航近年报考热度持续上升；拥有力学（A）、机械工程（A）、管理科学与工程（A）、航空宇航科学与技术（A-）、控制科学与工程（A-）、信息与通信工程 （A-）、软件工程（A-）共7个A-及以上学科，航空宇航与力学学科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等南航核心招 生专业大类2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会热度高；重庆市物理类考生2021年约9.9万人→2025年约13.9万人→2026年估算约13.6万人（总考生20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65%估 算），考生规模高位略降，整体平稳；南航位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对西南地区考生有较 强吸引力；该校在重庆招生规模较大（60–76人），属省外重点生源省份，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年已至历史最佳（4748名）、2026年计划大幅缩招 （67→60人，-10.4%）、声誉偏负面信号、以及考生规模高位略降等因素，预计2026年竞争加剧，位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约4600名，区间4100–5100名。

- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖创新班）
- 工程力学（钱伟长拔尖创新班）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（4100–5100名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如4100名以内）可重点冲击一档拔尖创新班和计算机 类王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如5000名左右）应以二档航空航天类、电子信息类为核心，三档新能源材料、车辆工程等作为稳妥选择。南航航空宇航、力学、机械等A级学科 实力突出，相关专业就业竞争力强，值得优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 8218, 9103, 11724, 6098, and 4748 respectively, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. After hitting a low in 2023, rankings moved significantly forward for two consecutive years, with the 2025 baseline at about 4748, the best level in five years. From 2021 to 2023, the provincial enrollment plan for the Physics Category was 76 students each year, dropping to 66 in 2024 and slightly rising to 67 in 2025. The 2026 plan further reduces to 60 students, a decrease of about 10.4% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 35th in 2021, 37th in 2022, 37th in 2023, 36th in 2024, 36th in 2025, and 37th in 2026, stable within the 35–37 range, placing it among the top national 211 universities. In 2025, its reputation was generally positive, with steadily improving admission cutoffs, selection for the National Excellent Engineer College, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%. In 2026, its reputation turned negative (due to a laboratory explosion and fire accident). Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranked 61st (rated as "average"), with moderate short video exposure. The 2025 abnormal admission signal was "high attention," reflecting the continuously rising application popularity of NUAA in recent years. It has 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Aerospace Science and Technology (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Information and Communication Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-). Aerospace and mechanics disciplines are particularly strong and highly matched with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment major categories at NUAA, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity. The number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing was about 99,000 in 2021, rising to about 139,000 in 2025, and estimated at about 136,000 in 2026 (total examinees 209,000, estimated at about 65% Physics Category in recent years). The examinee scale is slightly decreasing from a high level, remaining generally stable. NUAA is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong appeal to examinees from the southwestern region. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Chongqing (60–76 students), making it a key out-of-province source province, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical ranking reached its best level in 2025 (4748th), the 2026 plan significantly reduces enrollment (67 to 60 students, -10.4%), the reputation signal is negative, and the examinee scale is slightly decreasing from a high level, competition is expected to intensify in 2026, with rankings slightly moving back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4600, with a range of 4100–5100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (4100–5100), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4100), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top innovation classes and top computer majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 5000), you should prioritize Tier 2 aerospace and electronic information classes, with Tier 3 new energy materials, vehicle engineering, etc., as stable choices. NUAA's A-level disciplines in aerospace, mechanics, and mechanical engineering are outstanding, and related majors have strong employment competitiveness, making them worth prioritizing.
